---
title: "02. 对立互生与二元结构"
subtitle: "Complementary Opposition and Binary Duality"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 2
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 2, 5, 11, 20, 26, 36, 40, 41, 45, 58, and 78 map co-arising opposites onto the golden-mean shift and the fold operator."
---

**Chapters:** 2, 5, 11, 20, 26, 36, 40, 41, 45, 58, 78  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_02_binary_duality.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## NotebookLM Slides

[Download Slides (PDF)](../../media/cultural/tao-te-ching/category_02_binary_duality_slides.pdf)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_binary_duality_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_binary_duality_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_binary_duality_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_binary_duality_infographic.png)
